titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the David Lehman Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday February 4, 2020 at 04:00

did.unittitle: David Lehman papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings, notebooks, journals, calendars, school papers, teaching materials, photographs, artwork, and other papers by, to, or relating to David Lehman.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.
Boxes 109, 110 (audiovisual material): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 111 (computer media): Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

bioghist.head: David Lehman
bioghist.p: David Lehman is an American poet and the editor of the Best American Poetry series. He teaches at The New School in New York City.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from James S. Jaffee Rare Books on the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2012, and gift of David Lehman, 2012.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: David Lehman Papers. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The David Lehman Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized in ten series: I: Writings, 1970s-2000s; II: Writings of others, 1970s-2000s; III: Correspondence, 1960s-2000s; IV: Notebooks, 1970s-2000s; V: Best American Poetry records, 1980s-2010s; VI: Work files, 1970s-2000s; VII: Personal papers and artwork, 1965 - 1991; VIII: Printed material, 1970s-2000s; IX: Audiovisual materials, 1975-2000s; X: Computer media, 2000s.

did.unittitle: Writings

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains writings by David Lehman, and includes typescripts of his published and unpublished works, galleys of his published books, and related materials such as notes, correspondence, and research materials.

did.unittitle: Ecstatic Occasions, Expedient Forms, drafts; The Presidential Years and other Poems, drafts;

Presidential Years and other Poems, draft; Ecstatic Occasions, Expedient Forms - miscellaneous correspondence (post-publication) & reviews; Ecstatic Occasions, Expedient Forms - contributor's notes, archive files, and correspondence.

E. Richie to D. Lehman - correspondence and writings 1994; Aaron Fogel to D. Lehman - correspondence and writings 1997; Leigh to D. Lehman, containing Fairfield Porter correspondence to James Schuyler; Estatic Occasions, Expedient Forms - photocopies; Sprial binder - Houghton Library, Harvard, May 1994; Houghton Library photocopies; Ashbery interview by Bill Berkson 1969; Ashbery manuscripts - Houghton Library; John Ashbery to James Schuyler - photocopies 1956-1969; Marc Cohen 4/14/98; Letters to Schuyler - Ashbery, Auden, Freilicher, Alex Katz; Koch; Ashbery - Joe Brainard, San Diego March 1997.
Notebooks, school writings and other writings

James Merrill: Essays in Criticism - drafts; corrected proofs; correspondence 1977-1994; David Kalstone draft 1981; Elemental Bravery read by John Mathews 1981; Cornell, J.M. Author's questionnaire 2/82, reviews of book; Charles Berger 1981; Willard Spiegelman; Stephen Yenser; Nadel; The Angelic Secretariat; On, and of, James Merrill; Merrill prospectus; James Merrill - preface; Merrill - Elemental Bravery final; Essay on James Merrill, revised; Merrill - Elemental Bravery, original; Merrill - my essay.
Ph.D. Dissertation - David Lehman, Columbia 1978; Brooklyn College - student evaluations 1975-1976.
Proofs "The last Avant-Garde: The Making of the New York School of Poetry", "Signs of the Times", "The Perfect Murder", "An Alternative to Speech","The Marriage of Poetry and Prose"
Left over poems from "The Daily Mirror" and proofs;The Break Up; Renga; "An Alternative to Speech"
Ecstatic Occasions, Expedient Forms - reviews and review lists
Master Proofs "An Alternative to Speech", "Operation Memory"
"The Line Forms Here", working poems, Erotic Poems, Hitchcock and others; corresspondence
Research, notes, proposals and drafts for "Deconstruction in America",
"Signs of the Times" drafts and research and related material
Writings, poems and prose; Best American Poetry Material; Writings of others include, Karl Shapiro, Tom Disch
"Selected Letters of Fairfield Porter" by Ted Leigh corrected drafts, notes and correspondence.
Writings, writings of others, notes, correspondence
Proofs and drafts "The Last Avant-Garde"
Poetry by others for Bennington Review and Seminars
Material from Jane Hammond; "Great American Prose and Poems", some BAP 2003 and 2004 material
Various drafts of "A Fine Romance" and related material
Writings of others

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series consists of typescripts, photocopies, and published editions writings by others, submitted to David Lehman for his comment. Some of the writings include inscriptions, or accompanying correspondence by their authors.

did.unittitle: Materialism - Poems by Jorie Graham; Alice Fulton; Dear Utopia, circa 1989; Nothing Heavy; Nevins Street: 1991; The Silver Figures, 1983; Dear X; Poems from the West Side: 1981-1987; Aaron Fogel; Leaves that Grow Inward, Susan Mitchell; A Poet's Alphabet of Influences; Last Times, Robert Polito; The Continuous Life, Mark Strand; Dark Harbor, Mark Strand; Edwin Denby; Hard Food for Midas, Paul Stellato; Fearing, 1989; Eagle Pond Farm, 1988; Morning Poems, Robert Bly; From Frank Bidart, 7 May 1994; Desire, Frank Bidart; The Reading of an Ever Changing Tale, John Yau; Michael Burkard, 1977; John Yau, 1976-1977; Strange Bedfellows, Mary Morris; Some Time in the Winter, Michael Burkard; The Mind-Body Problem, Katha Pollitt, 2008; From A Compeddium of Butterflies Nails and Wild Gresses, Catherine Bowman; China and Mongolia (Poems), 2008.

Writings of others; John Yau, West Point Class of 2009, Vincent Katz, Elizabeth Converse. Shannon Holman, H.L. Hix, Charles Simic, Holaday Mason, James Tate, A.R. Ammons, David Galenson, William Craig Rice, Aaron Fogel, Ron Horning, Tony Paradise, Rick Arnold, Frank Bidart, Rebecca Mostov, John Black, Robin Neidorf, Peter Gizzi, Paul Alexander, Roger Gilbert; collected works; "The Dilation of David's Pupils, The Whole Works Too, As the Gray Mist Rises
Chinese "Junes", 6/3/08; Alice Fulton, 2003; Koethe; Poems by Douglas Crase; Night and Day; Glenn Horowitz, 1994-1995; China & Mongolia, 5/08; Elizabeth Foster, 1979.
The Hasty Papers, Alfred Leslie, circa 1994.
Correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains David Lehman's correspondence, dating from the 1960s to the 2010s.

did.unittitle: Postcards and letters

Correspondence, including letters from college; Also includes work files and clippings, including: Boston Globe 1996; NBCC 1997; Recommendations '94-95; DL's introductions, CSMA Fall 1994; Internet print outs, Sept '94; The Sequence - Valentine Place; Washington Post; Newsweek; Ithaca clips: Fall 1994; Essays and Annotations; Wiliam Everson to Richard Howard, 1979; DL's Poems in Spanish and French; Poems about DL, 2003-2004; Poems to DL, 2003-2004; Photographs - Florida December 1999, KGB Bar Book of Poems, 2000.
Correspondence
Correspondence and writings; "Beyond Amazement" materials include correspondence, drafts, proofs
Correspondence, photographs, address books

Correspondence; poetry magazine, Nin Andrews, Beth, Marjorie Perloff, Horning, Darryl Pinckney, Trevor Winkfield, Anne Lehman, D. Shapiro, Cornell Alumni News, Dana Gioria, Carolyn Kizer, Joe Brainard, Simic, Connell, Alice Fulton, Disch, Harry Mathews, Susan Wheeler, Aaren Fegel, Don Hall, John Ashberrry,and others
Correspondence includes Thomas Disch, Kay Ryan, Robert Bly, Elain Equi, Charles Reznikoff, John Updike,Geoff Young, Ed White and others
Correspondence and business card binders
Correspondence, assorted clips, NYFTA, Poems, AARP, Fellowships, Bellagio, Collages, New School, Financial, BAP
Correspondence, drafts, writings of others, printed materials, calendars, contacts list, teaching material
Correspondence, 2002.
Notebooks
Notebooks and calendars
Notebooks
Notebooks and calendars
Notebooks and calendars, greeting cards
Notebooks
Notebooks and calendars
Best American Poetry records

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series consists of materials related to David Lehman's role as the founder and editor of Best American Poetry, a series of annual poetry anthologies. Materials date from the 1980s to the 2010s.

did.unittitle: BAP 1995, BAP 1994, Best Poetry '88, BAP 1993, Ecstatic Occasions, Pro. Trilling, Copies of Articles '74 '76, Verbicide, Gigs 2000-2001, College Days, Bascove

Best American Poetry - notes and records, including: BAP reviews, work files, permissions from publishers, contributor notes and comments, correspondence, preliminary selections and recommendations, Donald Hall's introduction drafts, and full drafts; Also includes: Harper's Magazine, Sept. 1989; The One Day: A Poem in Three Parts; Los Angeles Times Book Review, 23 July 1989; Debora Greger.

B.A.P 1995 - as copy edited; Best American Poetry 1999 - photocopy of draft; Best American Erotic Poems, circa 2007; Eros 2 + Contribs + Bios 7/12/2007; B.A.P Plagiarism 1996; Paul Muldoon circa 2005; B.A.P. 1992 - Donald Justice; David Lehman - correspondence with Amy Clampitt, 1989; The New Yorker poems 1995, incl. The Atlantic, Harper's, The New Republic; the New York Review; A. Rich - poem sent to her, 1995; Poems to Yosef Komunyakaa; Toward B.A.P. 2003 - Yosef Komunyakaa, circa 2002; Yosef Komunyakaa - B.A.P 2003; John Ashbery Selcted Prose, draft 2003; Best American Poetry 2004; Eros Intro as Alexis marked it up, 7/12/07; Bob Hass's short list, circa 2000; The Spence School, 23 April 2007; Dinner Party, 1/24/06; Seoul 2006; The Unexamined Life - Ron Horning & David Lehman 1989.

BAP 1991 original manuscript edited, letters, permissions, reveiws, contributors notes, other correspondence ;BAP 1990 original manuscript edited, letters, permissions, reveiws, contributors notes, other correspondence; Jorie Graham introduction; one folder of BAP 1992 material
Correspondence, proof, drafts, contact lists, notes, permissions,
Galleys, Setting copies
Ammons 1993, Ash Fest 2006, Billy Collins, BAP 2007, Heather McHugh, BAP 2008, BAP contest, BAP 2009, corrspondence

NY School, Larry Rivers, Harold Rosenburg, Clement Greenbey, Harry Mathews, painting, Allen Ginsberg, Jane Hammond, Denmark, Ron Padgett, BAP 2002, BAP 2003, BAP 2001,Robert Creeley, Last Avent-Garde, View, Stamps, Ammons, Set in Motion, Desire for Strange Cities, people
Various writings of other related to BAP, Tebot calandar 2003-2004, writings by Lehman

Best American Poetry files include correspondence, notes, proofs, writings; NEA material;The Making of the Oxford Canon talk delivered at Bennington College June 2004; Oxford Book of American Poetry; Yeshiva Boys and Other Poems
Teaching material, correspondence, Paul Violi Poetry prize material, Best American Poetry 2011 annotated proofs, "A Fine Romance" revision, "A Fine Romance" draft
Bap 2009, Correspondence 2008, Harold Arlen, Next book, Mystery/Spies, Reveiws, Mark Stevens
Work files

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains files on a variety of topics, primarily related to David Lehman's work as a writer, editor, and teacher. Materials date from the 1970s to the 2000s.

did.unittitle: Report cards, etc; Ingram Merrill; NEM Fellowship: ETC; Guggenheim Fellowship; Guggenheim 1989; Fellowships; Letters of Recommendation; CAPS & NEA; Newsweek artciles (xerox); An Alternative to Speech; Operation memory; Correspondence; Nin; DL. Lit. Journalism; Molly Arden; Malcom / McGinnis et al; Washington Post; Boston Globe; N.Y. Times; Chicago Tribune; L.A. Times; Alabama 1982; Elizabeth Bishop; Reviews; P.C.; NBCC; New School '93; CSMA.

Water color postcard "David Lehman… for Nancy Kuhl"; John Ashbery Interview with correspondence, 1978 February 19; 1962 Date Book with notes, circa 1962; Art of Memorization and related email correspondence.

Poems - Summer 2000; Daily Poems, 1997-2000; DL foreword 3/25/09; 1995 Poems; The Honeymooners 3-91; KGB Bar - Book of Peoms, cover art, 1999; KGB Bar, Boook of Poems, correspondence, 1998-1999; The Code of Napoleon, poems - drafts; AWP - April 1999; Poems, 1991-1999; When A Woman Loves a Man, draft, 2003; Effect of Anology; Sestina, 1995; Villanelle "Wedding Song" 1995; Wagner was the Puccini of Opera, 1995; The Double Agent, 1995; Guggenheim, 1996; Writers Representatives, Inc., 2003; When A Wonder Loves A Man, 1995; Clippings, 1994; An Alternative to Speech; Valentine Place, 1995; BAP 2009; The Daily Mirror, 1999; Poetry in Motion, 1970s-1980s; Baylor Lecture, 2009; Poems, 2002; Gillian's Possible Cuts, 1999; Poems, 1994; Copies of Poems, 1994; BAP 09 Forward and blog, 2009.

Poetry drafts; David Lehman collages (2005); application forms; resumes and CVs; information on academic jobs; general publication notes; David Lehman writing drafts and completed poems; general correspondence, including email printouts; poetry readings; bibliographies; rejections and acceptances of poetry manuscripts; notebooks; travel notes; college correspondence and notes; writings by others; photocopies; lecture notes.
Notebooks;Writing Drafts, Yashiva Boys, Poems, Picture This, various prose and poetry; teaching and class materials

Student Evaluations 1976-1980; Poets on Jazz, 2000; New School - Fall 2003; Maggie Nelson, 1994-1997; New School 07; Oxford UP Blog 2006; Story of Great Poems, circa 1997; Best Poems of the Century; Ashbery - Best of 20th Century; Best of 20th Century; Oxford UP; Oxford - Joan Murray et al., 2005; Penguin 1995 Anthology; John Brehm 2003 [empty folders]; When A Woman Loves a Man, 2003-2004; DL's poems, circa 2001.

Files; Publishing industry, travel, small presses, Martin Amis, MLA 1986, PEN Congress, Giroux book, Literary Lioness, Larkin, miscellaneous literary journalism, literary awards, Harold Bloom, Richard Howard, Tom Disch, short stories, computer fiction Translation, Joyce Carol Oats, Cythia Ozick, Ulster, PSA at MLA, American Nursing Home, employment

Fine Romance, Nin Andrews, Erin Malley Hoax: correspondence, including emails; writings by David Lehman; writings by others; MLA (Fall 1978); work files and notes; notes on other authors; Dorothy Fields; Al Jolson; printouts regarding American Literary History; Lloyd Schwartz.

Files include, NYFA, Survey of English Literature, assorted syllabi, poems for class, war poems, creative writing, Comedy, Cornell fall 1980, Cornell spring 1981, comtemporary British poetry, Freshman English, modern British poetry, Sestina, Exotic forms, The Evening Post, The Daily Mirror, Poems

Ammons essay; Lila Wallace - Reader's Digest Fund Writer's Awards Selection Committee Meetings, 1993; PSA 1988-1990; NBCC 1984-1992; NBCC records; NBCC panel.

Yellow notebooks, 1987; Holocaust 9-30-88; Holocaust, 1988; In the Holocaust Gallery, 1988-1989; Eridanos Press, Inc., 1988-1990; Israel 1988; Poetry Reviewing Controversy, 1987; Highsmith, 1988; Jason Epstein 1987-1988; No Place Like Home Plate; Giamatti, 1988; NYW and Vogue, 1987; UTZ 1-15-89; Book Mark 2/13/90; University of Chicago Press, 1988; Bible, 1987; Ross Thomas, 1987; Newsweek - Roger Angell 3-88; Ellis / Janowitz, 1987; Miami, 1987; Dinesen; Safire, 1987; Robert Penn Warren, U.S. Poet Laureate, 1986; Cultural Conservatism, 1983; Dennis Porter - The Singing Detective; McInerney, 1988; Updike; 48th International PEN congress, 1986; Clips - PEN Congress, 1986.

Gigs 1998 / 1999 and beyond; Poems 1992-1993 Xerox copies; Poems Spring '92 - working; Current 1990-1991; Madam X, 1982; Play 1977; Joey 1982; Philadelphia; Other poems and art work, 1990; The Secret Life, June 1992; Cleveland 11-91; The Evening Sun, 2001; Valentine Place - drafts of poems; Operation Memory - poems by David Lehamn, 1988; From Operation memory - work in progress, Sept. 1988; Selected reviews; Selected Literary journalsim, 1983-1987.

"On The Publishing Front" - Partisan Review 1988, draft; Jonathan Galassi; Publishing clips 1987-1988; Pulbishing 1987; New York Times 1987; Simon & Schuster 1987; Newsweek - The Book Makers, 1984; Ann Getty - George Weidenfeld; Publishing - February 1988.

Signs of the Times - correspondence 1991-1993, England 1991-1992, paperback edition 1992, reviews 1991, afterword and corrections 1990-1992, long reviews 1992; The Perfect Murder - correspondence 1984-1990, reviews 1989-1990; The Free Press 1988; Savvy 1987-1988; Mystery Stuff clips etc since 1989; published poems; BAP reviews, etc.; Beyond Amazement - reviews; reviews of DL's poetry, circa 1987; The interruption 1992 - poems.

"Jahrbuch der Lyric 2002", P.C., postmodernism, National Book Awards, Poetry Readings, Introductions, Glück, Donald Hall correspondence, Donald Hall, Strand, Simic, Ithaca College, Ambler, Utah, Norton, Laura Riding, MLA, Alabama, Washington, Dartmouth, Loyola, Aselphi, Iowa, Claremont, Chelsea

Poetry journals; magazines; notes; David Lehman drafts, including: Modern Love and On The Nature of Desire; Newsweek notes and expenses; sports training notes; clippings; general research materials, including: John Lennon & Yoko Ono, Ernest Hemingway, Dylan Thomas and Joseph Brodsky, etc.; Muriel Sparks press packets; general writings; poetry reviews and notes; notes regarding other authors; "current" work files; poetry clips from Best American Poetry.
New York Times Magazine, November 9 1986; Random House 10/86
Files; CCT/Taylor, Thesaurus, A.R. Ammons, Ammons Blog, Ammons interview, Ammons since 1991, Ashfest, Post Modernism, Norton '93, EOEF 1986-1987, Valentine Place, James Tate, Whitman '05

Personal papers and artwork

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains David Lehman's personal papers. Materials date from 1965 to 1991.

did.unittitle: Diplomas; English Tripos Part II; Newspaper reviews; photographs
Diplomas; artwork
Diplomas; artwork; photographs
Printed material

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains printed materials collected and maintained by David Lehman. Materials date from the 1970s to the 2000s.

did.unittitle: Many copies of Cornell Alumni News, The New York Arts Journal, and many poetry publications; Aaron Fogel manuscript.

Various magazines; catalogs; newspapers; clippings; book reviews; literary journals and supplements; Living Theatre handbills; photocopies of published articles; notes to David Lehman; various ephemera; Bennington College Writing Seminars Commencement program, 1988.
The New York Times Book Review and Magazine
Press releases and printed material related to electronic novels
Audiovisual materials
1 reel-to-reel video tape
20 mini cassettes, 13 audio cassettes
Computer media
1 CD
